seoTitle: How to Create a Membership Community on Gumroad
metaDescription: Learn how to launch a recurring membership community on Gumroad, from setting subscription pricing to protecting member-only content.
intro: Gumroad isn't just for one-time sales; you can also build a recurring membership community where subscribers pay monthly or annually for exclusive access. This guide covers setting up that membership product, structuring pricing, and organizing the content your members will get.

steps.heading: Start a new membership product
steps.body: From your product directory, choose the membership option so Gumroad configures the listing for recurring billing.

steps.heading: Set your recurring pricing
steps.body: Decide whether you want monthly, quarterly, or annual billing, and set the price for each tier.

steps.heading: Write your community description
steps.body: Explain clearly what members get access to, since this is what convinces people to subscribe.

steps.heading: Add exclusive content
steps.body: Upload the downloads, videos, or resources your members will unlock after joining.

steps.heading: Publish and welcome members
steps.body: Go live with your membership and set up how you'll communicate updates to new subscribers.

faq.question: Can I offer both monthly and annual membership pricing?
faq.answer: Yes, Gumroad membership products support different recurring billing intervals so you can offer multiple pricing tiers.

faq.question: How do members access exclusive content?
faq.answer: Once subscribed, members get ongoing access to the content you've attached to the membership product.

faq.question: What happens if a member cancels?
faq.answer: Their recurring billing stops and their access to member-only content typically ends at the close of their current billing period.

faq.question: Can I update membership content after launch?
faq.answer: Yes, you can keep adding new content over time to give existing members ongoing value.
